lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Hello adventurer, what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, just wanted a chat..

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: It's always a pleasure to catch up with an another mage! Especially one who has helped me so much!

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Oh, by the way, I found this odd thing lying around, does it belong to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, yes - I was wondering where that had gone...

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: You should look after your things more carefully you know...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: How are your researches going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, not so bad. I'll let you know if I find anything I think you'll find interesting...

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Thanks! I'd appreciate that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this seed do?

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Fascinating ... a crystal seed. You should have a look at the crystal bowl in the other room, must be related...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll do that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this crystal saw do?

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: I've no idea, it must have been Oaknock's, he liked talking to the elves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where would I find out how the thing works?

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Errm, I'm not sure. Have a chat with Hazelmere, maybe he'll know. He was around when

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Oaknock was alive and might have seen him use it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excellent idea, I'll do that. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teleport me to the Rune Essence?

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Okay. Hold onto your hat!

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Senventior Disthine Molenko!

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: You have my gratitude, young delivery person!

lines.speaker: Brimstail
lines.text: Well done!
